name: ChurnLens
description: ChurnLens is a buyer-side SaaS due-diligence tool: upload subscription CSVs and get a report on hidden churn, revenue concentration, and decay risk before acquiring a SaaS business.
disambiguatingDescription: ChurnLens at churnlens.site is an independent buyer-side due-diligence tool used by acquirers and PE/M&A analysts to assess a SaaS target's revenue and churn quality before purchase. It is unaffiliated with the similarly named churnlens.io (retention automation) or churnlens.tech (churn prediction).

hasPart.name: ChurnLens
hasPart.description: ChurnLens is a buyer-side SaaS due-diligence tool: upload subscription CSVs and get a report on hidden churn, revenue concentration, and decay risk before acquiring a SaaS business.
